chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-231 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection No.2 2. For order on Misc. No.896/2023 (Exemption) 3. For order on Misc. No.897/2023 (Stay) 4. For order on Misc. No.898/2023 (Inspection) 5. For hearing of main case 23.1.2026 None present for the petitioner --------------------- This is an old petition of 2023, which is more than three years ago. Since inception, no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner, which shows lack of interest of the petitioner in pursuing this petition; therefore, this Court is left with no option but to dismiss this petition for non-prosecution. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
